# test-kb — Knowledge Base

> Main topic index — content layer only. This is the entry point for `/kb-query`.
> Source-summary entries live in `source_index.md` (provenance layer); they are read by `/kb-query` only behind a permission gate.

(Populated by `/kb-ingest` as concept pages are created under `wiki/concepts/`.)

(Populated by `/kb-ingest` as entity pages are created under `wiki/entities/`.)

## Comparisons

(Populated by `/kb-ingest` as comparison pages are created under `wiki/comparisons/`.)

(Populated by `/kb-lint` when wiki pages drift out of the index.)
